M. Patient Perspectives: 
This submission did not include specific info1mation on patient perspectives for this device. 
Patient perspectives FDA considered for the DreaMed Advisor Pro include info1mation obtained 
through discussion with patients at public fonnns regarding their experience with continuous

N. Conclusion 
The info1mation provided in this de novo submission is sufficient to classify this device into 
class II under regulation 21 CFR 862.1358. FDA believes that the special controls, in 
combination with the general controls provide a reasonable assurance of the safety and 
effectiveness of the device type. The device is classified under the following: 
Product Code: QCC  
Device Type: Insulin Therapy Adjustment Device  
Class: II (special controls)  
Regulation: 21CFR862.1358
